workflow.name: On-Demand Test Reporting And Export Workflow
workflow.description: Flow FE-10 v1 bat dau tu report API. TestExecution gateway assemble deterministic report context, TestReporting sanitize du lieu, tinh coverage, render file, upload qua Storage, persist metadata, va tra download route ngay trong request.

architectureOverview.summary: POST generate report la luong tao file duy nhat. GET list/get/download chi doc report metadata va storage binary da ton tai. TestReporting la primary module, nhung moi run data tu TestExecution phai di qua contract gateway. Async queue workflow duoc tri hoan sau v1.
architectureOverview.futureExtension: Neu can async export queue, email delivery, hay compare-regression reports sau nay, co the mo rong tren nen v1 sau khi API file generation da on dinh.

rules: Tra ve ownership + suite/run access context.
Doc detailed run results tu cache cua TestExecution va bubble `RUN_RESULTS_EXPIRED` neu can.
Assemble ordered test definitions va recent run history trong 1 gateway call.

ApiDocumentation.usage: Lay endpoint metadata cho ordered endpoint scope de tinh by-method, by-tag, va uncovered paths.

Storage.usage: Upload rendered file va download file binary cho report route.

steps.action: POST /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/test-runs/{runId}/reports
Lay CurrentUserId va dispatch GenerateTestReportCommand.
Goi ITestRunReportReadGatewayService.GetReportContextAsync(...), validate owner, validate request format/type, va call generator.
Sanitize data, load endpoint metadata neu co ApiSpecId, tinh coverage, build structured document model, chon renderer theo format.
Upload file qua IStorageFileGatewayService, upsert CoverageMetric, create TestReport metadata row, return TestReportModel.
Return 201 Created voi metadata va download route.
GET /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/test-runs/{runId}/reports
Dispatch GetTestRunReportsQuery.
Validate suite ownership qua `ITestExecutionReadGatewayService.GetSuiteAccessContextAsync(...)`, query TestReport metadata by runId, map to models.
Nhan 200 OK voi report inventory cho run.
GET /api/test-suites/{suiteId}/test-runs/{runId}/reports/{reportId}/download
Dispatch DownloadTestRunReportQuery.
Validate owner, load TestReport row, call IStorageFileGatewayService.DownloadAsync(fileId).
Return File(content, contentType, fileName).
Load suite access context de lay owner/project/specification info.
Load TestRun theo suiteId + runId va validate `Status in (Completed, Failed)`.
Validate `RedisKey`, `ResultsExpireAt`, va deserialize `TestRunResultModel` tu distributed cache.
Call existing `ITestExecutionReadGatewayService.GetExecutionContextAsync(testSuiteId, null)` mot lan va filter mapping trong memory.
steps.output: Ordered test definitions + ordered endpoint ids

steps.action: Load recent run history tu cung suite theo `RunNumber DESC`, gioi han boi `recentHistoryLimit`.
Return `TestRunReportContextDto` gom suite/run/history/definitions/results.
Lay endpoint metadata cho ordered endpoint scope, tinh TotalEndpoints, TestedEndpoints, CoveragePercent, ByMethod, ByTag, UncoveredPaths.
Mask headers, variables, va response previews truoc khi document model duoc render.
Render document model thanh file content phu hop voi ReportFormat.
Upload file, persist coverage, persist report metadata.

rules: Chi duoc deserialize 1 `TestRunResultModel` cache payload cho mot request generate report.
Cho v1, duoc phep load full execution context mot lan roi map testCaseId trong memory.
Recent run history phai co gioi han ro rang (default 5, max 20).
Chi goi `IApiEndpointMetadataService` mot lan cho toan bo ordered endpoint ids.
Khong goi metadata service per endpoint.
Khong doc Storage de tai lai file vua tao trong cung request.

examples: Ban khong co quyen thao tac test suite nay.
REPORT_RUN_NOT_READY: Chi co the tao report sau khi test run da Completed hoac Failed.
RUN_RESULTS_EXPIRED: Chi tiet ket qua da het han luu tru trong cache.
Khong tim thay test run voi ma '{runId}'.
REPORT_NOT_FOUND: Khong tim thay report metadata voi ma '{reportId}'.
REPORT_FILE_NOT_FOUND: Khong tim thay file report trong storage.
REPORT_RENDER_FAILED: Khong the render report voi format hien tai.
REPORT_UPLOAD_FAILED: Khong the upload file report vao storage.

qualityGates.name: No Cross-Module DbContext Access
qualityGates.rule: TestReporting chi duoc read TestExecution qua contract gateway va chi duoc ghi file qua `IStorageFileGatewayService`.

qualityGates.name: No New Migrations
qualityGates.rule: FE-10 v1 khong duoc them entity moi, table moi, hoac EF migration moi.

qualityGates.name: Sanitized Export Only
qualityGates.rule: Headers, variables, va response previews co secrets phai duoc mask truoc khi render file.

qualityGates.name: Deterministic Coverage
qualityGates.rule: Coverage chi duoc tinh tu ordered suite scope va actual run results cua FE-07/08.
